name: Knowledge Panel Install
description: A twelve-month build that makes Google and the AI answer engines recognize the client as a real entity: a Google Knowledge Panel with its qualifying signal set, answer-engine coverage with monthly testing, a Wikipedia and Wikidata attempt, a schema stack, a podcast, press, and a full year of monthly verification and reporting. Application only.

audience.audienceType: Executives, authors, entrepreneurs, and professionals who want a formal, Google-recognized personal brand

priceSpecification.description: $1,000 per month for twelve months. Twelve-month build with monthly verification and reporting.
Single upfront payment for the twelve-month build, a $2,000 savings against the monthly plan.

hasOfferCatalog.name: What the Knowledge Panel Install includes

itemOffered.name: The Knowledge Panel
itemOffered.description: A Google Knowledge Panel with its full qualifying signal set: a Wikidata Q-number, a Wikipedia submission attempt, a Schema.org JSON-LD stack, and first-page ownership of the client's brand search.

itemOffered.name: AI Answer Engine Coverage
itemOffered.description: Coverage across the major AI assistants with monthly testing, 48 tests over twelve months, confirming accurate and consistent descriptions and flagging drift.

itemOffered.name: The Podcast and IMDb
itemOffered.description: A podcast with three episodes the client records, launched and produced, earning an IMDb Person page through the podcast credit.

itemOffered.name: The Signal Set and Reporting
itemOffered.description: A placed article, five press releases, three guest placements on shows doing 10,000+ monthly downloads, social handle consistency, search cleanup, twelve monthly reports, and four quarterly Knowledge Panel verifications.
